title: triticum umbellulatum
intro: Triticum umbellulatum is a type of wild grass native to the mountainous regions of the Himalayas and the Tibetan Plateau. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Triticum umbellulatum include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Triticum umbellulatum include infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which are used to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and skin conditions.
